alkylation reagent: the sample alkylated in 30 μL 50 mM iodoacetamide
fragmentation method: followed by product ion spectra (10 HCD, 30K resolution)
instrument: Thermo Electron Q Exactive HF-X mass spectrometer
ionization type: The nanospray ion source was operated at 1.8 kV
labeling: peptides eluted from the column by an acetonitrile/0.1 M formic acid gradient
reduction reagent: rehydrated in 30 μL of 10 mM dithiolthreitol (DTT)
reduction concentration: rehydrated in 30 μL of 10 mM dithiolthreitol (DTT)
